title: Supplier Portal
description: List products, answer RFQs, and keep your prices current.

steps.title: Your products
steps.description: Verified products appear in the public catalogue.
steps.voiceScript: Your listed products appear in the public catalogue once verified.
steps.captionText: Your listed products appear in the public catalogue once verified.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your products: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Add a product
steps.description: Category drives the required specification fields.
steps.voiceScript: Let us add a product. The category drives which specs are required.
steps.captionText: Let us add a product. The category drives which specs are required.
steps.fallbackMessage: Add a product: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Specification fields
steps.description: Missing specs are flagged in a buyer's BOQ.
steps.voiceScript: Fill the required specification fields, or buyers will see them flagged.
steps.captionText: Fill the required specification fields, or buyers will see them flagged.
steps.fallbackMessage: Specification fields: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Submit for verification
steps.description: An admin verifies before it goes public.
steps.voiceScript: Submit it. An administrator verifies the listing before it goes public.
steps.captionText: Submit it. An administrator verifies the listing before it goes public.
steps.fallbackMessage: Submit for verification: not visible on this screen yet.
